script_text: Writers choose special words to make us feel something.
Some words help us hear, see, or touch a story in our mind.
Let us find some feeling words!
Some words help us use our senses.
Warm, soft, bright. These help us feel and see.
Whisper, crash, boom. These help us hear.
Listen for sense-y words as you read!
Listen. The bright sun warmed her face.
Which word helps us feel the sun? Warmed!
That word makes us feel the sun on our own skin.
When you read a feeling word, stop and feel it for a moment.
Now you are ready to practice finding feeling words!
